## Summary

- **Issue:** #
- **Problem:**
- **What changed:**
- **What did NOT change (scope boundary):**

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] CI / Infra
- [ ] Chore

## Area

- [ ] Runtime / Gateway
- [ ] Memory / Storage (SQLite, LanceDB, pgvector, Cosmos)
- [ ] Channels (Telegram, Discord, WebChat)
- [ ] Tools / Spells
- [ ] Models / Providers
- [ ] Automation / Cron
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Multi-Project / Multi-Instance
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --release` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (or CI-blocked issues documented)
- [ ] Issue updated with progress
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Breaking changes documented
